backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the portfolio backend with artwork CRUD, image/blob storage, text content, media contacts, and password-based admin authentication using a hardcoded djb2-style hash and role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a fix for the 'Unauthorized: Only admins can perform this action' error in the Admin Panel, listing the affected frontend files and associated components/test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose, styling approach, and key behavioral details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Khudrang Kalakaar Portfolio' and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (portfolio, admin-login, admin), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider, and renders a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component that fetches and displays artist name, bio, portrait image, and static stats grid with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/ArtworkGallery.t: Gallery grid component that fetches all artworks, renders them in a responsive grid with hover overlays, and opens a lightbox dialog on selection.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Renders a contact section with WhatsApp, Instagram, and location/phone/email cards, fetching contact details dynamically via the `useMediaContacts` hook and showing skeletons while loading.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProjects: Displays a hardcoded list of five featured art projects by mapping over a static array and rendering each as a `ProjectSection` component with alternating image/text layouts.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, social links (WhatsApp/Instagram), quick navigation links, and a hidden admin-login easter egg triggered by five rapid logo taps.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section that displays the artist's name, tagline, stats, and a WhatsApp CTA button over a dynamic cover image, with skeleton loaders while data fetches.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, active section highlighting, smooth-scroll links, a WhatsApp CTA, and a hidden admin-login trigger on five rapid logo taps.
frontend/src/components/ProjectSection.t: Reusable card component that renders a single project with an image and text panel side-by-side, supporting an optional reversed layout via the `reverse` prop.
frontend/src/components/QRSection.tsx: Displays an Instagram QR code image and a follow button, fetching the Instagram profile URL via `useMediaContacts` and showing a skeleton while loading.
Renders a 6-card grid section listing artist services (murals, interior decoration, commercial spaces, etc.) with icons, numbered watermarks, and hover effects on a dark charcoal background.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Renders a 6-card grid section highlighting trust/differentiator points (quality, passion, timeliness, etc.) with icons and hover animations on a light cream background.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via React Query, using the current Internet Identity or an anonymous identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, admin checks, password login, and artwork upload/edit/delete operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollSpy.ts: Custom hook that tracks which section ID is currently in view based on scroll position, returning the active section ID.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a warm artisanal OKLCH color palette with CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/lib/adminAuth.ts: Provides client-side admin authentication utilities including credential validation via a djb2 hash, and localStorage-based session creation, validation, and clearing with a 24-hour expiry.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, then mounts it to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page with username/password form that validates credentials via adminAuth utilities, creates a session, and redirects to the admin panel on success.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing artworks (upload/edit/delete) and site media (logo, cover image, artist portrait) and social/media contacts, guarded by admin session validation.
frontend/src/pages/PortfolioPage.tsx: Main public portfolio page that composes all section components (Hero, About, Services, Gallery, Contact, etc.) with Navigation and Footer.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom brand color palettes (terracotta, gold, cream, charcoal), typography, border radius tokens, and dark mode settings via CSS variables.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the current fix request: resolving the 'Unauthorized: Only admins can perform this action' error in the Admin Panel for image uploads and social link saves.
